CustomField.formula:
RPAD("BEAT", 16, " ") & "2FT01" & RPAD(RIGHT(Name, 7), 8, " ") & RPAD(TEXT(ROUND(Actual_Charge_Amount__c * 100, 0)), 12, " ") & RPAD( Donor_ID__c & " " & CASE( Group__c, "Football", "FBM ", "Basketball Men", "BBM ", "Basketball Women", "BBW ", "Hockey", "HKY ", "OTH " )&
text(Event_Date__c) & " " & CASE( ND_Ticket_Type__c, "Seat", "TK ", "Parking", "PK ", "Pregame Pass", "PP ", "OTH " )&
LEFT(Requested_By__r.FirstName, 1) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Requested_By__r.MiddleName)), LEFT(Requested_By__r.MiddleName, 1), "" ) & LEFT(Requested_By__r.LastName, 1), 35, " " ) & RPAD("C 1", 10, " ") & RPAD(LEFT(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 6), 6, " ") & RPAD(MID(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 8, 5), 6, " ") & RPAD(MID(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 14, 5), 6, " ") & RPAD(MID(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 20, 5), 6, " ") &
IF(LEN(Revenue_FOAPAL__c) >= 30, RPAD(MID(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 26, 5), 6, " "), "") & IF(LEN(Revenue_FOAPAL__c) >= 31, RPAD(MID(Revenue_FOAPAL__c, 31, 5), 6, " "), "")
CustomField.label: nd jv credit entry
